originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Debugging Episode Index Bug and Reviewing Enduro C Bindings Port
summary: Diagnosed a multiprocessing crash in the experience buffer, identified a one-character bug in an episode index comparison using git bisect, and fixed it. Also reviewed a contributor's PR porting the Enduro environment to the new C binding format, suggesting simplifications and code improvements.
